title: Triglyceride Analysis Protocol
author: John Stack
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.y4bfysn

steps.instruction: Calibrate Cobas for Triglyceride analysis by running a multi-analyte calibrator and two control serum.

Sample handling as performed by Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 4 µL of sample into cuvette. b) Add 275 µL of Triglyceride liquid reagent. c) Incubate at 37ºC for 10 minutes. d) Absorbance is measured at 500nm.

substeps.instruction: Sample handling as performed by Cobas Mira Plus.
Pipette 4 µL of sample into cuvette.
Add 275 µL of Triglyceride liquid reagent.
